PDEs: \begin{cases} \frac{\partial u}{\partial t} = D \nabla^2 u \\ \frac{\partial v(t, x)}{\partial t} = \begin{cases} \frac{1-v(t, x)}{\tau_{mv}(u)} & u(t, x) < V_c \\ \frac{-v(t, x)}{\tau_{pv}} & u(t, x) \ge V_c \end{cases} \\ \frac{\partial w(t, x)}{\partial t} = \begin{cases} \frac{1-w(t, x)}{\tau_{mw}(u)} & u(t, x) < V_c \\ \frac{-w(t, x)}{\tau_{pw}} & u(t, x) \ge V_c \end{cases} \\ I_{fi}(u, v) = \frac{-v(t, x) \cdot H(u(t, x) - V_c) \cdot (u(t, x) - V_c) \cdot (1 - u(t, x))}{\tau_d} \\ I_{so}(u) = \frac{u(t, x)(1 - H(u(t, x) - V_c))}{\tau_0} + \frac{H(u(t, x) - V_c)}{\tau_r} \\ I_{si}(u, w) = \frac{-w(t, x)(1 + \tanh(k(u(t, x) - V_{csi})))}{2\tau_{si}} \\ H(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x < 0 \\ 1 & x \ge 0 \end{cases} \end{cases}
